title: Banking and Brotherhood Conspiracy Themes
summary: Drop #5 referenced global finance, the Muslim Brotherhood, and hidden influence claims. Several themes overlapped with long-running conspiracy narratives.
raw_text:

lines.fact: Central banks are generally operated by national governments or independent monetary authorities with varying governance structures.
lines.theory: Q followers connected this to global banking conspiracy theories involving elite families.
lines.context: Claims about secret banking dynasties often overlap with historically antisemitic conspiracy narratives.
lines.questions: What verifiable ownership structures exist for major central banks?
